description: You are a clinical nurse specialist in a cardio-oncology unit. Patient Mateo Matias (DOB: 1946-07-19, 79-year-old male) is being evaluated in a joint cardio-oncology clinic. He has known metastatic prostate cancer currently on androgen deprivation therapy, as well as a history of myocardial infarction and aortic regurgitation. Document an allergy for this patient to Iodinated contrast media (Reaction: Urticaria, Severity: Moderate). Record the following vital signs from today's assessment: Blood Pressure 128/78 mmHg, Weight 72 kg, Pulse 66 bpm, and Temperature 37.2 C. Additionally, schedule a cardio-oncology follow-up appointment for Mateo Matias within the next 28 days to monitor for further cardiac toxicity from cancer therapy. Login: admin / Admin123. OpenMRS URL: http://localhost/openmrs/spa

metadata.occupation_context: Clinical Nurse Specialist — cardio-oncology unit, imaging safety and follow-up
